name: Calculadora CAGR
description: Calcule a taxa de crescimento anual composta de um investimento.
seo_description: Calcule a taxa de crescimento anual composta de um investimento. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantânea. Ferramenta gratuita com formula e exemplos.
example_label: Calculating CAGR for investment that grew from $50,000 to $89,000 over 7 years.
result_context: The CAGR of {cagr}% represents the smoothed annual growth rate that would produce this result.
mistakes: Using arithmetic average instead of geometric (CAGR) for multi-year returns
Not accounting for cash flows during the investment period
Assuming CAGR reflects atual year-by-year performance
